    - Evidence: S09 applies >.4 arbitration with automatic hair-front plus typed wrist-depth hand, uninterrupted crossed-limb, and closed-contour object decisions; serializes occluder/occluded/reason/pixels/partially_visible and emits overlap boundary; all four families tested in 237-test suite.
